title: Comment on: Short pulse width widens the therapeutic window of subthalamic neurostimulation
journal_name: Annals of Clinical and Translational Neurology
study_question: Does charge-per-pulse reanalysis change therapeutic window interpretation in subthalamic neurostimulation?
population_assessed: Patients from Reich et al with subthalamic neurostimulation, reanalyzed from prior study data
outcome_measures: Charge per pulse, therapeutic window, rigidity control, muscle contraction threshold
inclusion_criteria: Reported Reich et al data across varied pulse widths
answer_to_study_question: Charge-based reanalysis indicates wider pulses yield a larger therapeutic window than narrower pulses.
